languages.text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."
languages.original_text: "Добро пожаловать в мою бывшую обитель, Вольный Торговец. Годы оказалось куда менее милосердны к ней, чем я предполагал. Уповаю лишь на то, что мы успели вовремя, и непоправимое еще не свершилось".

traits.locale_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. The time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only trust that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

"Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

languages.text: "Добро пожаловать в мою бывшую обитель, Вольный Торговец. Годы оказалось куда менее милосердны к ней, чем я предполагал. Уповаю лишь на то, что мы успели вовремя, и непоправимое еще не свершилось".

"Willkommen in meiner einstigen Bleibe, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Wobei die Zeit weit weniger gnädig war, als ich erwartet hatte. Ich hoffe nur, wir sind rechtzeitig eingetroffen und das Irreparable ist noch nicht eingetreten."
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: "Willkommen in meiner einstigen Bleibe, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Wobei die Zeit weit weniger gnädig war, als ich erwartet hatte. Ich hoffe nur, wir sind rechtzeitig eingetroffen und das Irreparable ist noch nicht eingetreten."

languages.text: « Bienvenue dans mon ancienne demeure, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'espérais que le passage du temps l'aurait davantage épargnée. J'espère simplement que nous sommes arrivés à temps et que l'irréparable n'a pas encore été commis. »
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: « Bienvenue dans mon ancienne demeure, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. J'espérais que le passage du temps l'aurait davantage épargnée. J'espère simplement que nous sommes arrivés à temps et que l'irréparable n'a pas encore été commis. »

languages.text: «Bienvenid{mf|o|a} a mi humilde hogar, Comerciante. El tiempo ha demostrado tener menos piedad con él de lo que anticipaba. Solo espero haber llegado a tiempo y que aún no se haya producido lo irreparable».
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: «Bienvenid{mf|o|a} a mi humilde hogar, Comerciante. El tiempo ha demostrado tener menos piedad con él de lo que anticipaba. Solo espero haber llegado a tiempo y que aún no se haya producido lo irreparable».

languages.text: "Eski meskenime hoş geldiniz Hür Tacir. Her ne kadar zaman ona umduğumdan çok daha acımasız davranmış olsa da... Tek umudum, zamanında yetişmiş olmamız ve geri döndürülemez olanın henüz gerçekleşmemiş olması."
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: "Eski meskenime hoş geldiniz Hür Tacir. Her ne kadar zaman ona umduğumdan çok daha acımasız davranmış olsa da... Tek umudum, zamanında yetişmiş olmamız ve geri döndürülemez olanın henüz gerçekleşmemiş olması."

languages.text: “欢迎来到我昔日的居所，行商浪人。尽管岁月对它的摧残远比我预想的更加无情。只盼我们来得还算及时，一切尚未走到无法挽回的地步。”
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: “欢迎来到我昔日的居所，行商浪人。尽管岁月对它的摧残远比我预想的更加无情。只盼我们来得还算及时，一切尚未走到无法挽回的地步。”

languages.text: 「ようこそ、かつての私の住処へ、ローグトレーダー。時間は、私が予想していたよりもずっと容赦なく、この場所を蝕んできました。私たちは間に合ったことを願うばかりです。修復不可能な事態がまだ起こっていないことを。」
languages.original_text: "Welcome to my former abode, Rogue Trader. Though time has proven far less merciful to it than I anticipated. I only hope that we have arrived in time, and the irreparable has not yet come to pass."

traits.locale_text: 「ようこそ、かつての私の住処へ、ローグトレーダー。時間は、私が予想していたよりもずっと容赦なく、この場所を蝕んできました。私たちは間に合ったことを願うばかりです。修復不可能な事態がまだ起こっていないことを。」
